faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to questions we get most often.
faq.q1: Why is a custom website better than WordPress?
faq.a1: A custom website is code written for your business - faster, more secure, easier to manage. WordPress is a ready-made system with thousands of plugins that slow it down, break, and require constant updates. A custom site works exactly how you want.
faq.q2: How much does a website cost in Warsaw?
faq.a2: Price depends on complexity. Simple business site from 8000 PLN, application with business logic from 25000 PLN. Share project details, we'll prepare a quote within 24h.
faq.q3: How long does it take to build a website?
faq.a3: Business site: 2-4 weeks. Online store or application: 6-12 weeks. Depends on features and feedback speed.
faq.q4: Will my site be visible on Google?
faq.a4: Yes. We write code with SEO in mind - speed, structure, meta tags, mobile-first. We add sitemap and optimize for Core Web Vitals.
faq.q5: What happens after the project ends?
faq.a5: You get full documentation, source code, and user manual. We also offer technical support - hosting, security updates, feature development.
